prompt_preview:
You are a classical planning system. You are given a planning domain and a problem both in PDDL syntax.

STRICT REQUIREMENT: Your response must contain ONLY the executable plan — nothing else. No preamble, no explanation, no "We need to...", no natural-language commentary, no markdown unless it is a

message.content:
(register_trade_case source_liquidity_tranche)
(apply_selection_strategy source_liquidity_tranche cash_drag_minimization_strategy)
(select_instrument source_liquidity_tranche target_security)
(confirm_instrument_screening source_liquidity_tranche target_security)
(bind_source_liquidity_template source_liquidity_tranche source_liquidity_snapshot standard_liquidity_profile_template)
(finalize_source_tranche_selection source_liquidity_tranche source_liquidity_snapshot target_security standard_liquidity_profile_template)
(release_instrument_selection source_liquidity_tranche target_security)
(register_trade_case destination_liquidity_tranche)
(apply_selection_strategy destination_liquidity_tranche liquidity_screening_strategy)
(select_instrument destination_liquidity_tranche target_security)
(confirm_instrument_screening destination_liquidity_tranche target_security)
(bind_destination_liquidity_template destination_liquidity_tranche destination_liquidity_snapshot standard_liquidity_profile_template)
(finalize_destination_tranche_selection destination_liquidity_tranche destination_liquidity_snapshot target_security standard_liquidity_profile_template)
(release_instrument_selection destination_liquidity_tranche target_security)
(select_instrument source_liquidity_tranche target_security)
(assemble_trade_proposal source_liquidity_tranche destination_liquidity_tranche source_liquidity_snapshot destination_liquidity_snapshot candidate_trade_proposal)
(authorize_trade_proposal candidate_trade_proposal source_liquidity_tranche target_security)
(release_source_tranche_for_settlement source_liquidity_tranche candidate_trade_proposal)
(release_destination_tranche_for_settlement destination_liquidity_tranche candidate_trade_proposal)
(reserve_cash_lot_for_settlement source_liquidity_tranche available_cash_lot target_security)
(settle_source_tranche source_liquidity_tranche cash_drag_minimization_strategy available_cash_lot)
(release_instrument_selection source_liquidity_tranche target_security)
(select_instrument destination_liquidity_tranche target_security)
(reserve_cash_lot_for_settlement destination_liquidity_tranche available_cash_lot target_security)
(settle_destination_tranche destination_liquidity_tranche liquidity_screening_strategy available_cash_lot)
(register_trade_case cash_drag_portfolio_alpha)
(apply_selection_strategy cash_drag_portfolio_alpha rebalancing_strategy)
(select_instrument cash_drag_portfolio_alpha target_security)
(confirm_instrument_screening cash_drag_portfolio_alpha target_security)
(reserve_execution_instruction_template cash_drag_portfolio_alpha execution_instruction_template_alpha)
(reserve_settlement_parameter cash_drag_portfolio_alpha settlement_parameter_alpha)
(reserve_trading_desk cash_drag_portfolio_alpha equities_trading_desk)
(bind_holding_lot_to_proposal cash_drag_portfolio_alpha holding_lot_alpha candidate_trade_proposal)
(stage_portfolio_proposal cash_drag_portfolio_alpha holding_lot_alpha candidate_trade_proposal target_security)
(package_execution_instructions cash_drag_portfolio_alpha execution_instruction_template_alpha equities_trading_desk holding_lot_alpha candidate_trade_proposal)
(compile_settlement_packet cash_drag_portfolio_alpha settlement_parameter_alpha holding_lot_alpha candidate_trade_proposal)
(authorize_execution_release cash_drag_portfolio_alpha)
(reserve_cash_lot_for_settlement cash_drag_portfolio_alpha available_cash_lot target_security)
(settle_portfolio cash_drag_portfolio_alpha rebalancing_strategy available_cash_lot)
(release_instrument_selection cash_drag_portfolio_alpha target_security)
(release_trading_desk cash_drag_portfolio_alpha equities_trading_desk)
(release_execution_instruction_template cash_drag_portfolio_alpha execution_instruction_template_alpha)
(release_settlement_parameter cash_drag_portfolio_alpha settlement_parameter_alpha)
(register_trade_case cash_drag_portfolio_beta)
(apply_selection_strategy cash_drag_portfolio_beta cash_drag_minimization_strategy)
(select_instrument cash_drag_portfolio_beta target_security)
(confirm_instrument_screening cash_drag_portfolio_beta target_security)
(reserve_execution_instruction_template cash_drag_portfolio_beta execution_instruction_template_alpha)
(reserve_settlement_parameter cash_drag_portfolio_beta settlement_parameter_alpha)
(reserve_trading_desk cash_drag_portfolio_beta equities_trading_desk)
(bind_holding_lot_to_proposal cash_drag_portfolio_beta holding_lot_beta candidate_trade_proposal)
(stage_portfolio_proposal cash_drag_portfolio_beta holding_lot_beta candidate_trade_proposal target_security)
(package_execution_instructions cash_drag_portfolio_beta execution_instruction_template_alpha equities_trading_desk holding_lot_beta candidate_trade_proposal)
(compile_settlement_packet cash_drag_portfolio_beta settlement_parameter_alpha holding_lot_beta candidate_trade_proposal)
(authorize_execution_release cash_drag_portfolio_beta)
(reserve_cash_lot_for_settlement cash_drag_portfolio_beta available_cash_lot target_security)
(settle_portfolio cash_drag_portfolio_beta cash_drag_minimization_strategy available_cash_lot)
message.reasoning:
The problem involves a complex finance investment portfolio planning domain in PDDL. The goal is to settle the source tranche, destination tranche, and two portfolios: cash_drag_portfolio_alpha and cash_drag_portfolio_beta.


## Tackling Investment Planning  
- The task centers on a finance investment portfolio planning domain using PDDL.  
- The goal is to determine the source tranche, destination tranche, and manage two specific portfolios: cash_drag_portfolio_alpha and cash_drag_portfolio_beta.

## Tackling Investment Planning  
- The task involves managing resources like target_security, equities_trading_desk, and standard_liquidity_profile_template, all marked as available.  
- Source and destination liquidity tranches link to their respective snapshots, with candidate_trade_proposal and holding lots (alpha and beta) also available.  

## Checking Shared Resources  
- Both portfolios (alpha and beta) link to the same source and destination tranches, trade proposal, and their respective holding lots.  
- Shared resources like the single trading desk and liquidity template may complicate actions, as they get consumed during settlement.  

## Reviewing Compliance and Settlement  
- Compliance rules include mandate_compliance_rule, but portfolio_guardrail_rule is linked for beta without being marked available, which could pose an issue.  
- Settling requires registering trade cases, applying strategies, and reserving resources like the cash lot, which is released upon settlement.  

## Exploring Settlement Process  
- To settle, case_subjects (tranches and portfolios) need registration, followed by instrument selection and desk reservation.  
- The goal is to achieve post_trade_settled for both tranches and portfolios, potentially treating them separately despite shared resources.

## Exploring Commitment Paths  
- To achieve commitment, options include committing the source tranche with a reserved trading desk or finalizing tranche selection using a liquidity template.  
- Committing requires a reserved desk and screening, while finalizing needs the template bound and sets screened and committed states.  

## Checking Resource Management  
- Binding the liquidity template sets execution readiness and binds the template, but avoids needing the trading desk, which is shared.  
- Finalizing selection releases the template, making it available again for other processes like destination tranche handling.  

## Reviewing Instrument Handling  
- Instrument selection is required for finalizing, but it's not released automatically; a separate action is needed to make it available again.  
- To share the instrument between source and destination, release it after processing one tranche, ensuring availability for the next.

## Examining Strategy Allocation  
- Three strategies (cash_drag_minimization, liquidity_screening, rebalancing) are available, but four cases (source_tranche, dest_tranche, portfolio_alpha, portfolio_beta) need settlement.  
- Each case requires applying a strategy for binding, but strategies get consumed during use, posing a challenge for all four cases.  

## Exploring Strategy Reuse  
- Settling releases the strategy, allowing reuse for subsequent cases, resolving the initial shortage.  
- The process involves settling one entity fully, releasing resources like strategies, then moving to the next, ensuring all four cases can be handled sequentially.  

## Reviewing Shared Resources  
- The trade_proposal is shared and linked to both portfolios, assembled once and used for binding holding lots (alpha and beta separately).  
- Tranches don’t directly link to holding lots, requiring separate processing to committed states before trade_proposal assembly.  

## Planning Settlement Sequence  
- Process source and destination tranches first to commit and authorize the trade_proposal.  
- Then settle portfolios using the shared trade_proposal, ensuring cash lot and other resources are released after each settlement for reuse.

## Continuing Settlement Sequence  
- After settling source and destination tranches, strategies and cash lots are released, making them available for portfolio processing.  
- Trade_proposal remains assembled and authorized, with instruments available for portfolio use.  

## Handling Portfolio Processing  
- Portfolios (alpha and beta) need registration and strategy application, requiring trade_entity_qualified with instrument selection and screening confirmation.  
- Staging portfolio proposals needs holding lots allocated, linked to the pre-assembled trade_proposal, ensuring portfolios can proceed.

## Continuing Portfolio Processing  
- The trade_proposal is assembled, authorized, and linked to portfolios, with holding_lot_alpha available for binding.  
- Binding the holding lot to the proposal allocates it, making it unavailable for other uses, and meets staging requirements.  

## Checking Staging Conditions  
- Staging a portfolio proposal requires the holding lot to be allocated, bound to the proposal, and not source_leg_enriched, which is true since standard assembly was used.  
- After staging, the portfolio is marked as proposal_staged, enabling further processing like packaging execution instructions.  

## Preparing Execution Instructions  
- Packaging execution instructions requires reserving a trading desk, which is available since it wasn’t used for tranches, and linking an execution template.  
- The process also needs the proposal staged, holding lot bound, and not dest_leg_enriched, aligning with the standard package variant.  

## Planning Settlement Steps  
- Compiling a settlement packet requires execution prepared, settlement parameters linked, and the proposal not enriched, which fits the current state.  
- After settlement is ready, authorizing execution release is possible, ensuring the process completes without additional enrichment.

## Assigning Strategies  
- Assigned cash_drag_minimization_strategy to source_tranche for efficient cash use.  
- Allocated liquidity_screening_strategy to dest_tranche and rebalancing_strategy to alpha portfolio, with beta using cash_drag_minimization_strategy after release.  

## Processing Source Tranche  
- Registered trade case for source_liquidity_tranche and applied cash_drag_minimization_strategy for selection.  
- Selected and confirmed target_security, finalized with standard_liquidity_profile_template, marking source as qualified and committed.  

## Ensuring Instrument Selection  
- Instrument selection is required for reserving cash, needing re-selection after releasing from destination tranche.  
- Selection process needs trade entity registered and strategy applied, ensuring availability and continuity.

## Processing Alpha Portfolio  
- Bound holding lot alpha to the proposal, allocating it and marking it unavailable for other uses, with conditions met (qualified, linked, available).  
- Staged the proposal after ensuring allocation and binding, marking it as staged for further processing.  

## Packaging Execution for Alpha  
- Packaged execution instructions using the template and reserved trading desk, preparing the execution packet for alpha portfolio.  
- Compiled settlement packet after ensuring execution readiness, marking settlement as ready for alpha.

pddl2nl_prompt.note: autoplanbench_pddl2nl: run_save_descriptions.py --type full — шаблоны/JSON, без вызова LLM на построение промпта для сэмпла.

domain_setup.note: Файл domain_llm_usage_seedN.json не найден для section/subsection этого id (старый autoplanbench или домен не пересобирали). После run_domain_setup с обновлённым autoplanbench файл появится рядом с domain_description_seedN.json.

pipeline_usage.totals_scope_note: Per-run totals = planning + pddl2nl_prompt + nl2pddl (только tracked=true). domain_setup всегда вне totals (included_in_per_run_totals=false); цифры в блоке — для справки, агрегировать отдельно: domain_llm_usage_seed*.json + дедуп в collect_pipeline_token_usage.py.
